# The Secret Karimunjawa

> 3 exclusive ocean-facing villas in Karimunjawa with 120° sunset panorama. Built with love, welcomed like family.

## About The Secret Karimunjawa
The Secret Karimunjawa is a boutique lodging located in Karimunjawa Island, Central Java, Indonesia. It was built by Eddy & Patricia as their family home and now features 3 exclusive sea-facing villas with a 120° panorama over a serene mangrove bay. Rated 9.6 Exceptional on Booking.com.

## Key Facts
- **Location**: Karimunjawa, Jepara, Central Java, Indonesia
- **Accommodation**: 3 private ocean-facing villas (Cipaku, Birdsong, Tivoli Garden)
- **Pricing**: Rp 1,600,000 - Rp 2,500,000 / night (varies by season and villa)
- **Key Features**: 120° Sunset & Sea View, Private Verandas, Tropical Gardens, Eco-conscious living.
- **Rating**: 9.6/10 on Booking.com
- **Direct Booking**: WhatsApp (+62 896 8238 1293) — no agents, no commissions.
